dialogos.texto_en: Ahh... I'm so tired...
It somehow ended without any issues...
Both of you look exhausted. Are you okay?
I feel so drained.\nIt's like all the tension\nhas been released from my body.
Me too...
I'm really glad we didn't mess up.\nAs Futaro said, dreams are just dreams, after all.
Right?\nYou worry too much over a silly dream.
A silly dream?\nDid you dream about the wedding failing?
Yeah. I had it last night.\nIt was a terrible nightmare.
I kept tripping over my wedding dress,\nFutaro was spilling drinks,\nit was just a series of failures%p-2;――
And in the end, the letter I wrote to everyone turned\ninto a letter from the time when Futaro and I were pen\npals, and I had to read it in front of everyone...
Oh man. Why did it turn out like that?
I was so embarrassed...\nI thought I was gonna die...
Big bro and Miku-san, you guys were pen pals?
Yeah.\nAh, you didn't know that, huh, Raiha.\nIt started after I moved to Tokyo.
I see. So you were sustaining your relationship in that way.\nWow.
Stop phrasing it like that...
I have all those letters safely kept.\nWhat about you, Futaro?
Of course, I do too, but%p-2;――
Hey, make sure they don't find 'em.\nIf by any chance they see them, I'd die from embarassment!
Teehee, don't worry.\nThey're my treasured possessions, and safely stored.
I'm counting on you...
But seriously,\nI'm relieved that the nightmare didn't come true.
It's been a while\nsince I've seen you negative, Miku.
Well, it's a once-in-a-lifetime event,\nso I wanted to make sure it's a good memory for sure.
Don't worry, it was a beautiful ceremony!\nMiku-san, you looked stunning.
Thank you, Raiha-chan.
Oh, that reminds me.\nThank you for bringing the wedding rings.
Ah! That!\nBig bro, I REALLY can't believe you forgot it!
Ooh...\nI can only apologize for that.
And to make matters worse,\nit seems Dad did the same thing.
Dad, too?\nSeriously?
Miku-san.\nOur whole family seems to be like this,\nso we'll probably be causing you a lot of trouble, but%p-2;――
Please take care of big bro.
No, it's the other way around.\nFrom now on, please take care of me\nas a member of the family.
Ehehe...\nThese things make you blush, don't they?
Teehee, yeah, they do.
Ah, by the way.\nIf it's okay with you, Miku-san,\nI'd like to help out at the cafe.
You want to work part-time at the cafe?\nOf course, that would be great.\nNino would be happy too.
What's with the sudden part-time job?\nDo you want something in particular?
Not really.\nI just want to feel closer to you, big sis.
I'm so happy.\nI also want to feel closer to you, Raiha-chan.
Great!
Then, I'll teach you\nall about controlling big bro perfectly.
Hold on, Raiha.\nAre you trying to put needless ideas into Miku's head?
They're not needless, they're really important.\nThanks in advance, Raiha-chan.
Leave it to me!
Ah, but if it comes down to it, Miku-san,\nyou might actually be untouchable \nsince you hold the trump card a.k.a. the letter?
Hey?!
A trump card should be kept until the end.
Miku.\nShall we have a talk?
Just kidding.
Teehee!\nWell then, I'll go return your suit.
Okay, got it.\nThanks.
...Miku.\nPlease don't take Raiha's words too seriously.
Futaro, you still can't beat Raiha-chan\nno matter how much time passes.
But it's amazing to think she's\ngoing to be working at our place.\nWhen we met she was still in elementary school.
It's been five years already.\n...Our first milestone, I guess.
A milestone that's also a new beginning.
As husband and wife, as a family...\nThere are so many things I want to do with you, Futaro.
Things you want to do, huh?
...Futaro?
You said it, didn't you?\nDuring our vow kiss,\nto remember back five years ago.
...Yeah.\nDo you remember our first kiss at the school festival?
Of course.
Although, even if you tell me to remember that kiss,\nwell... I was overwhelmed,\nand just went along with whatever you did.
Teehee, maybe that's how it was.
Because you become all scary\nwhen you bottle up your emotions inside.\nFrom now on, don't hold back, and tell me everything.
...Is that okay?
Huh?
Well then, that being said%p-2;――
What the?!\nWh-what are you doing?
I'll start thinking about what I want to do.
...O-okay.
(What is this feeling...\n It's like I can't win against not only Raiha,\n but Miku, either...)
Futaro, you too.\nDon't hesitate to tell or ask me anything,
Alright, can I ask you one thing?
What is it?
Well%p-2;――
